title: Heimlern RepoBrief/rLens Bundle herstellen
goal: Einen aktuellen, konsumierbaren RepoBrief/rLens-Kontext für heimlern erzeugen oder die Registry-Lücke mit klarer Degradation dokumentieren.

acceptance.assertion: grabowski rlens bundle status for heimlern reports an existing complete bundle or a bounded documented unavailable reason.
A basic heimlern rLens context pack/query returns bounded evidence or explicit degradation without reading hidden live workspace state.
The task does not make RepoBrief/rLens a source of task truth, runtime truth or merge authority.

metadata.observed_gap: rlens-latest-complete-bundles.tsv did not contain a heimlern entry during the audit.
metadata.claim_boundary: read-only observation; no checkout mutation or hidden refresh authority

freshness_observation.bounded_degradation: Bundle exists and is structurally complete, but it is stale against the observed live Heimlern checkout and therefore must not be used as current repo truth.

context_pack_smoke.query: heimlern feedback proposal no auto apply weight adjustment evidence

range_get_note.reason: Manual range_ref replay was not used as acceptance evidence; context_pack/query already returned resolved citation/snippet evidence. Treat direct range_get formatting as a separate wrapper-hardening observation if needed.

validated_acceptance.bundle-observable: latest_complete_bundles, rlens_bundle_discover and rlens_bundle_status report heimlern-max-260705-0119 as an existing complete bundle with agent_reading_pack, canonical_md, sqlite_index, output_health pass, post_emit_health pass and bundle_surface_validation pass.
validated_acceptance.context-pack-smoke: rlens_context_pack and rlens_query_existing_index returned bounded evidence for a basic heimlern query; the pack explicitly reports stale_head and preflight warn instead of claiming freshness.
validated_acceptance.no-control-plane-claim: All rLens outputs used here carry does_not_establish and mutation_boundary fields; no RepoBrief/rLens output was treated as task truth, runtime truth, merge authority or source freshness proof.

validation: latest_complete_bundles returned a heimlern row for heimlern-max-260705-0119 with has_agent_reading_pack=yes.
rlens_bundle_discover(repo=heimlern) returned two heimlern candidates; selected max bundle has 16 roles and health pass.
rlens_bundle_status(stem=heimlern-max-260705-0119) returned exists=true, post_emit_health pass, output_health pass and bundle_surface_validation pass.
rlens_freshness_check(repo=heimlern, stem=heimlern-max-260705-0119) returned stale_head because bundle_commit differs from observed live checkout head.
rlens_query_existing_index returned status=available, hit_count=1, result_count=1, resolved citation cit_ead3a159e0652ebd and mutation_boundary writes=[].

rlens_context_pack returned available=true, preflight_status=warn, required_missing=[], recommended_missing=[snapshot_plan_json], resolved_evidence_status=available, snippet_count=1, range_count=1, citation_count=1.
